name: John Owens Services, Inc.
tagline: Family-run plumbing, heating & cooling for Sonoma and Marin since 1986
seoDescription: John Owens Services: family-run, Diamond Certified plumbing, HVAC & water heater experts serving Santa Rosa and the North Bay since 1986. CSLB #501853.

sections.heading: North Bay Plumbing, Heating & Cooling Done Right Since 1986
sections.subheading: John Owens Services is a local, family-run, Diamond Certified contractor serving Santa Rosa and the greater Sonoma and Marin County area
badges: Serving Santa Rosa & the North Bay since 1986

sections.heading: About John Owens Services
body: John Owens Services, Inc. is a local, family-run home comfort and plumbing company that has proudly served Santa Rosa and the greater Sonoma and Marin County area since 1986. Founded and owned by John Owens, the company holds licenses across plumbing, HVAC, radiant heating and boilers, and electrical work (CSLB #501853), so no plumbing, heating, or cooling job is too complex or too large for the team.

A Diamond Certified company, John Owens Services has earned a 4.9-star rating across hundreds of North Bay reviews by completing jobs quickly, efficiently, and professionally. As a Mitsubishi Diamond Elite and Rinnai Advanced Comfort Expert contractor, the team installs and services everything from tankless and heat pump water heaters to ductless mini-splits, furnaces, and hydronic boilers, often with same-day service.
highlights: Serving Santa Rosa & the North Bay since 1986
Licensed in plumbing, HVAC, boilers & electrical (CSLB #501853)
4.9-star rating across hundreds of Google reviews

items.title: Plumbing Repair & Installation
items.description: Full-service residential and commercial plumbing, from repairs and fixtures to repipes and new construction.

items.title: Water Heaters
items.description: Installation and service of tank, tankless, and heat pump water heaters, including same-day replacement when yours fails.

items.title: Heating & Furnaces
items.description: Installation, maintenance, and repair of direct vent furnaces, hydronic furnaces, and radiant boiler systems.

items.title: Air Conditioning & Heat Pumps
items.description: AC and heat pump systems plus Mitsubishi Diamond Elite ductless mini-split installation and service.

items.title: Leak Detection & Drains
items.description: Professional leak detection and drain services to find and fix problems fast before they cause damage.

items.title: Ductwork & Indoor Air
items.description: Duct installation and service to keep your home comfortable and your air clean year-round.

items.body: Call or message John Owens Services, Inc. and tell us what you need.

items.quote: Two technicians named Will came out the same day our old water heater died and replaced it in no time. Fast, efficient, and professional job.
items.author: Petaluma homeowner

items.quote: The whole experience from start to finish was wonderful. They were responsive and Keith was very helpful.
items.author: Tankless water heater customer

items.quote: Max was knowledgeable and neat, explained every step of the way, and tried the cost-effective solutions first.

sections.heading: Work with John Owens Services, Inc.
sections.body: Find us at 3471 Regional Pkwy Ste C. Call (707) 203-2517 — we’re glad to help.
